items.text: Metrics module at crates/liminal/src/metrics/mod.rs contains only pub mod and pub use declarations.
MetricsRegistry defined in crates/liminal/src/metrics/registry.rs holds all metric collectors and supports atomic snapshot reads.
Channel message rate tracked as a counter per channel, incremented on each successful publish.
Channel subscriber count tracked as a gauge per channel, reflecting current live subscribers.
Durable channel queue depth tracked as a gauge per channel, reflecting messages awaiting acknowledgement.
Channel delivery latency tracked as a histogram per channel, measuring time from publish call to subscriber delivery.
Active conversation count tracked as a gauge, reflecting currently open conversations across all channels.
Conversation completion rate tracked as a counter, incremented when a conversation reaches terminal state.
Conversation duration tracked as a histogram, measuring time from conversation open to close.
Conversation error rate tracked as a counter, incremented when a conversation terminates with an error.
Reject rate tracked as a counter per channel, incremented when a message is rejected due to consumer capacity.
Defer rate tracked as a counter per channel, incremented when a message is deferred into a buffer.
Capacity utilization tracked as a gauge per consumer, computed as in-flight messages divided by declared capacity.
TraceContext type defined in crates/liminal/src/tracing/context.rs carrying a trace ID and span ID.
Every conversation spawns a trace span that propagates to all messages within the conversation.
Structured log entries include the active trace context (trace ID, span ID) when a trace context is available.
All log entries are structured key-value pairs, not free-form text strings.
Prometheus-compatible renderer in crates/liminal/src/metrics/export.rs produces text exposition format from a registry snapshot.
